creator: info@babaei.net
text:
(In reply to Bernard Spil from comment #2)

Well, I cannot recall exactly. But, I tested this with three hosts (one were installed fro scratch). So I had to disable ssl otherwise none of them were working. Since I did was running both client and server on the same host locally disabling ssl won't pose a risk.

If that did work for you, I believe some configuration may have changed with the version in question since I use same config on all hosts.
